formula: var e=parseFloat(inputs.equity)||0;var d=parseFloat(inputs.debt)||0;var ce=parseFloat(inputs.cost_eq)||0;var cd=parseFloat(inputs.cost_debt)||0;var t=parseFloat(inputs.tax)||0;var total=e+d;var wacc=total>0?(e/total*ce+d/total*cd*(1-t/100)):0;return{wacc:wacc.toFixed(4)};

es.name: WACC (Coste Medio Ponderado Capital)
es.description: Calcula el coste medio ponderado del capital de una empresa.
es.seo_description: Calcula el coste medio ponderado del capital de una empresa. Calculadora gratuita, precisa e instantánea. Introduce tus valores y obtiene resultados.
es.example_label: Calculating WACC for company with 65% equity (11% cost), 35% debt (6% cost), and 25% tax rate.
es.result_context: The wacc of {wacc}% is the company's weighted average cost of capital, used as discount rate for investments.
mistakes: Using book values instead of market values for capital weights
Not adjusting debt cost for tax shield benefit
Using historical costs instead of current market costs
